content.text:
<file name="f:\AUDIRA-CHAT-AI\packages\database\prisma\schema.prisma" language="plaintext" >
<content>
generator client {
  provider        = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider   = "postgresql"
  url        = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

// ============================================
// ENUMS
// ============================================

enum UserRole {
  SUPER_ADMIN
  OWNER
  ADMIN
  AGENT
  VIEWER
  BILLING_MANAGER
}

enum TenantPlan {
  FREE
  STARTER
  PROFESSIONAL
  ENTERPRISE
}

enum ConversationStatus {
  OPEN
  ASSIGNED
  PENDING
  RESOLVED
  CLOSED
}

enum MessageDirection {
  INBOUND
  OUTBOUND
}

enum MessageStatus {
  QUEUED
  SENT
  DELIVERED
  READ
  FAILED
}

enum MessageType {
  TEXT
  IMAGE
  VIDEO
  AUDIO
  DOCUMENT
  LOCATION
  CONTACT
  STICKER
  TEMPLATE
  INTERACTIVE
}

enum WhatsAppProvider {
  CLOUD_API
  BAILEYS
  TWILIO
}

enum SessionStatus {
  CONNECTING
  CONNECTED
  DISCONNECTED
  BANNED
}

enum CampaignStatus {
  DRAFT
  SCHEDULED
  RUNNING
  PAUSED
  COMPLETED
  FAILED
}

enum WorkflowStatus {
  DRAFT
  ACTIVE
  PAUSED
  ARCHIVED
}

enum WorkflowExecutionStatus {
  RUNNING
  COMPLETED
  FAILED
  CANCELLED
}

enum PipelineStage {
  NEW_LEAD
  QUALIFIED
  PROPOSAL
  NEGOTIATION
  WON
  LOST
}

enum AgentType {
  SALES
  MARKETING
  SUPPORT
  REMINDER
  CRM
  CUSTOM
}

enum NotificationType {
  MESSAGE
  ASSIGNMENT
  MENTION
  SYSTEM
  CAMPAIGN
  WORKFLOW
}

// ============================================
// CORE MODELS
// ============================================

model User {
  id                String    @id @default(cuid())
  email             String    @unique
  passwordHash      String?
  name              String
  avatar            String?
  phone             String?
  emailVerified     Boolean   @default(false)
  twoFactorEnabled  Boolean   @default(false)
  twoFactorSecret   String?
  lastLoginAt       DateTime?
  createdAt         DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  memberships         TenantMember[]
  sessions            UserSession[]
  devices             UserDevice[]
  passwordResetTokens PasswordResetToken[]
  assignedChats       Conversation[]   @relation("AssignedAgent")
  messages            Message[]        @relation("SentByUser")
  internalNotes       InternalNote[]
  activities          Activity[]
  notifications       Notification[]
  auditLogs           AuditLog[]
  internalMessages    InternalMessage[] @relation("InternalMessageSender")

  @@map("users")
}

model UserSession {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId       String
  token        String   @unique
  refreshToken String   @unique
  expiresAt    DateTime
  ipAddress    String?
  userAgent    String?
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("user_sessions")
}

model UserDevice {
  id         String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId     String
  deviceName String
  deviceType String
  lastUsedAt DateTime @default(now())
  trusted    Boolean  @default(false)
  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("user_devices")
}

model PasswordResetToken {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  token     String   @unique
  expiresAt DateTime
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("password_reset_tokens")
}

// ============================================
// MULTI-TENANT
// ============================================

model Tenant {
  id          String     @id @default(cuid())
  name        String
  slug        String     @unique
  logo        String?
  domain      String?
  plan        TenantPlan @default(FREE)
  settings    Json       @default("{}")
  metadata    Json       @default("{}")
  createdAt   DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime   @updatedAt

  // Relations
  members          TenantMember[]
  whatsappSessions WhatsAppSession[]
  contacts         Contact[]
  conversations    Conversation[]
  campaigns        Campaign[]
  workflows        Workflow[]
  aiAgents         AIAgent[]
  knowledgeBases   KnowledgeBase[]
  pipelines        Pipeline[]
  apiKeys          ApiKey[]
  webhooks         Webhook[]
  subscription     Subscription?
  invoices         Invoice[]
  auditLogs        AuditLog[]
  analytics        AnalyticsEvent[]
  telegramBots     TelegramBot[]
  discordBots      DiscordBot[]

  @@map("tenants")
}

model TenantMember {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  userId    String
  role      UserRole @default(AGENT)
  joinedAt  DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  user   User   @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([tenantId, userId])
  @@map("tenant_members")
}

// ============================================
// WHATSAPP
// ============================================

model WhatsAppSession {
  id           String          @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId     String
  name         String
  phone        String?
  provider     WhatsAppProvider
  status       SessionStatus   @default(CONNECTING)
  credentials  Json?
  metadata     Json            @default("{}")
  lastActiveAt DateTime?
  createdAt    DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime        @updatedAt

  tenant        Tenant         @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  conversations Conversation[]
  messages      Message[]

  @@map("whatsapp_sessions")
}

// ============================================
// CONTACTS & CRM
// ============================================

model Contact {
  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId        String
  phone           String
  name            String?
  email           String?
  avatar          String?
  tags            String[] @default([])
  status          String   @default("ACTIVE")
  source          String?
  lastContactedAt DateTime?
  metadata        Json     @default("{}")
  lastSeenAt      DateTime?
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant        Tenant         @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  conversations Conversation[]
  deals         Deal[]
  activities    Activity[]
  campaignRecipients CampaignRecipient[]

  @@unique([tenantId, phone])
  @@map("contacts")
}

model Pipeline {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  name      String
  stages    Json     @default("[]")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  deals  Deal[]

  @@map("pipelines")
}

model Deal {
  id         String        @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId   String
  contactId  String
  pipelineId String
  title      String
  value      Float         @default(0)
  stage      PipelineStage @default(NEW_LEAD)
  probability Float        @default(0)
  closedAt   DateTime?
  createdAt  DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt  DateTime      @updatedAt

  contact  Contact  @relation(fields: [contactId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  pipeline Pipeline @relation(fields: [pipelineId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("deals")
}

model Activity {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  contactId String?
  userId    String?
  type      String
  title     String
  content   String?
  metadata  Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  contact Contact? @relation(fields: [contactId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  user    User?    @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@map("activities")
}

// ============================================
// CONVERSATIONS & MESSAGES
// ============================================

model Conversation {
  id              String             @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId        String
  contactId       String
  sessionId       String
  assignedAgentId String?
  channel         String             @default("WHATSAPP")
  status          ConversationStatus @default(OPEN)
  subject         String?
  tags            String[]           @default([])
  priority        String             @default("NORMAL")
  lastMessageAt   DateTime?
  resolvedAt      DateTime?
  firstResponseAt DateTime?
  metadata        Json               @default("{}")
  createdAt       DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime           @updatedAt

  tenant        Tenant          @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  contact       Contact         @relation(fields: [contactId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  session       WhatsAppSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  assignedAgent User?           @relation("AssignedAgent", fields: [assignedAgentId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  messages      Message[]
  internalNotes InternalNote[]

  @@map("conversations")
}

model Message {
  id             String           @id @default(cuid())
  conversationId String
  sessionId      String
  senderId       String?
  direction      MessageDirection
  type           MessageType      @default(TEXT)
  content        String
  mediaUrl       String?
  metadata       Json             @default("{}")
  status         MessageStatus    @default(QUEUED)
  externalId     String?
  isAI           Boolean          @default(false)
  createdAt      DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime         @updatedAt

  conversation Conversation    @relation(fields: [conversationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  session      WhatsAppSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  sender       User?           @relation("SentByUser", fields: [senderId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([conversationId, createdAt])
  @@map("messages")
}

model InternalNote {
  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
  conversationId String
  userId         String
  content        String
  mentions       String[] @default([])
  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())

  conversation Conversation @relation(fields: [conversationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  user         User         @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("internal_notes")
}

// ============================================
// AI SYSTEM
// ============================================

model AIAgent {
  id           String    @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId     String
  name         String
  type         AgentType
  description  String?
  systemPrompt String
  model        String    @default("gpt-4o")
  temperature  Float     @default(0.7)
  tools        Json      @default("[]")
  isActive     Boolean   @default(true)
  metadata     Json      @default("{}")
  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime  @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("ai_agents")
}

model KnowledgeBase {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  name      String
  description String?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant    Tenant              @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  documents KnowledgeDocument[]

  @@map("knowledge_bases")
}

model KnowledgeDocument {
  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
  knowledgeBaseId String
  title           String
  content         String
  sourceUrl       String?
  fileType        String?
  chunkCount      Int      @default(0)
  metadata        Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt

  knowledgeBase KnowledgeBase      @relation(fields: [knowledgeBaseId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  chunks        DocumentChunk[]

  @@map("knowledge_documents")
}

model DocumentChunk {
  id         String    @id @default(cuid())
  documentId String
  content    String
  embedding  String?
  metadata   Json      @default("{}")
  chunkIndex Int
  createdAt  DateTime  @default(now())

  document KnowledgeDocument @relation(fields: [documentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("document_chunks")
}

// ============================================
// WORKFLOWS
// ============================================

model Workflow {
  id          String         @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  name        String
  description String?
  status      WorkflowStatus @default(DRAFT)
  trigger     Json
  nodes       Json           @default("[]")
  edges       Json           @default("[]")
  settings    Json           @default("{}")
  createdAt   DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime       @updatedAt

  tenant     Tenant              @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  executions WorkflowExecution[]

  @@map("workflows")
}

model WorkflowExecution {
  id         String                  @id @default(cuid())
  workflowId String
  status     WorkflowExecutionStatus @default(RUNNING)
  input      Json                    @default("{}")
  output     Json?
  error      String?
  startedAt  DateTime                @default(now())
  finishedAt DateTime?

  workflow Workflow              @relation(fields: [workflowId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  logs     WorkflowExecutionLog[]

  @@map("workflow_executions")
}

model WorkflowExecutionLog {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  executionId String
  nodeId      String
  nodeName    String?
  status      String
  input       Json?
  output      Json?
  error       String?
  duration    Int?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  execution WorkflowExecution @relation(fields: [executionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("workflow_execution_logs")
}

// ============================================
// CAMPAIGNS
// ============================================

model Campaign {
  id          String         @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  name        String
  description String?
  status      CampaignStatus @default(DRAFT)
  template    Json
  scheduledAt DateTime?
  startedAt   DateTime?
  completedAt DateTime?
  stats       Json           @default("{}")
  createdAt   DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime       @updatedAt

  tenant     Tenant              @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  recipients CampaignRecipient[]

  @@map("campaigns")
}

model CampaignRecipient {
  id         String        @id @default(cuid())
  campaignId String
  contactId  String
  status     MessageStatus @default(QUEUED)
  sentAt     DateTime?
  deliveredAt DateTime?
  readAt     DateTime?
  error      String?

  campaign Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  contact  Contact  @relation(fields: [contactId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("campaign_recipients")
}

// ============================================
// BILLING
// ============================================

model Subscription {
  id                String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId          String   @unique
  stripeCustomerId  String?
  stripeSubId       String?
  plan              TenantPlan @default(FREE)
  status            String   @default("active")
  currentPeriodStart DateTime?
  currentPeriodEnd   DateTime?
  cancelAtPeriodEnd  Boolean  @default(false)
  metadata          Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt         DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("subscriptions")
}

model Invoice {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  amount    Float
  currency  String   @default("usd")
  status    String   @default("pending")
  stripeId  String?
  paidAt    DateTime?
  metadata  Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("invoices")
}

// ============================================
// API & WEBHOOKS
// ============================================

model ApiKey {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  name      String
  key       String   @unique
  scopes    String[] @default([])
  lastUsedAt DateTime?
  expiresAt DateTime?
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("api_keys")
}

model Webhook {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  url       String
  events    String[] @default([])
  secret    String
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  metadata  Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("webhooks")
}

// ============================================
// NOTIFICATIONS & AUDIT
// ============================================

model Notification {
  id        String           @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  type      String
  title     String
  body      String?
  data      Json             @default("{}")
  readAt    DateTime?
  createdAt DateTime         @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId, readAt])
  @@map("notifications")
}

model AuditLog {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String?
  userId    String?
  action    String
  entity    String
  entityId  String?
  changes   Json?
  ipAddress String?
  userAgent String?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  tenant Tenant? @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  user   User?   @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([tenantId, createdAt])
  @@map("audit_logs")
}

// ============================================
// ANALYTICS
// ============================================

model AnalyticsEvent {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  event     String
  data      Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([tenantId, event, createdAt])
  @@map("analytics_events")
}

// ============================================
// TELEGRAM
// ============================================

model TelegramBot {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  botId     String
  username  String
  name      String
  token     String
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  webhookUrl String?
  metadata  Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([tenantId, botId])
  @@map("telegram_bots")
}

// ============================================
// DISCORD
// ============================================

model DiscordBot {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  botId     String
  username  String
  name      String
  token     String
  guildId   String?
  channelId String?
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  metadata  Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([tenantId, botId])
  @@map("discord_bots")
}

// ============================================
// CANNED RESPONSES
// ============================================

model CannedResponse {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  shortcut    String
  title       String
  content     String
  category    String   @default("support")
  createdById String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([tenantId, shortcut])
  @@map("canned_responses")
}

// ============================================
// SCHEDULED MESSAGES
// ============================================

model ScheduledMessage {
  id               String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId         String
  conversationId   String
  content          String
  scheduledAt      DateTime
  status           String   @default("pending")
  recurring        Boolean  @default(false)
  recurringPattern String?
  sentAt           DateTime?
  createdById      String?
  createdAt        DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([tenantId, status, scheduledAt])
  @@map("scheduled_messages")
}

// ============================================
// MESSAGE TEMPLATES
// ============================================

model MessageTemplate {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  name        String
  content     String
  variables   String[] @default([])
  category    String   @default("utility")
  channel     String   @default("whatsapp")
  createdById String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([tenantId, name])
  @@map("message_templates")
}

// ============================================
// CONTACT SEGMENTS
// ============================================

model Segment {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  name        String
  description String?
  conditions  Json     @default("[]")
  createdById String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([tenantId, name])
  @@map("segments")
}

// ============================================
// CSAT SURVEYS
// ============================================

model CsatSurvey {
  id             String    @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId       String
  conversationId String
  sentById       String?
  rating         Int?
  comment        String?
  status         String    @default("sent")
  sentAt         DateTime  @default(now())
  respondedAt    DateTime?
  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now())

  @@index([tenantId, status])
  @@map("csat_surveys")
}

// ============================================
// CHATBOT FLOWS
// ============================================

model ChatbotFlow {
  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId        String
  name            String
  status          String   @default("draft")
  triggerKeywords String[] @default([])
  nodes           Json     @default("[]")
  edges           Json     @default("[]")
  createdById     String?
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("chatbot_flows")
}

// ============================================
// TEAM INTERNAL CHAT
// ============================================

model InternalMessage {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  senderId    String
  recipientId String?
  content     String
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  sender User @relation("InternalMessageSender", fields: [senderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([tenantId, createdAt])
  @@map("internal_messages")
}

// ============================================
// SECURITY
// ============================================

model IpWhitelist {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  ip          String
  label       String?
  description String?
  createdById String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  @@unique([tenantId, ip])
  @@map("ip_whitelist")
}

model SsoConfig {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId     String   @unique
  provider     String
  clientId     String
  clientSecret String
  domain       String
  enabled      Boolean  @default(false)
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("sso_configs")
}

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-CHAT-AI\README.md" language="markdown" >
<content>
# 🤖 Audira AI - WhatsApp Automation Platform

> Next-generation AI-powered WhatsApp automation SaaS platform

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend**: Next.js 14, React 18, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, shadcn/ui, Framer Motion
- **Backend**: Bun, Hono, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Redis, BullMQ, Socket.IO
- **AI**: OpenAI GPT-4o, LangGraph, pgvector, RAG Pipeline
- **DevOps**: Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Nginx

## Project Structure

```
audira-ai-whatsapp-automation/
├── apps/
│   ├── web/                 # Next.js frontend (port 3000)
│   ├── admin/               # Admin dashboard (port 3001)
│   ├── api/                 # Main API server (port 4000)
│   ├── ai-engine/           # AI service (port 4002)
│   ├── whatsapp-gateway/    # WhatsApp service (port 4003)
│   └── workflow-engine/     # Workflow service (port 4004)
├── packages/
│   ├── database/            # Prisma schema & client
│   ├── shared/              # Shared types, validators, utils
│   └── ui/                  # Shared UI components
├── infrastructure/
│   ├── docker/              # Dockerfiles
│   ├── kubernetes/          # K8s manifests
│   ├── nginx/               # Nginx config
│   └── scripts/             # Deployment scripts
├── docs/                    # Documentation
├── .github/workflows/       # CI/CD
├── docker-compose.yml       # Local development
├── turbo.json               # Turborepo config
└── package.json             # Root workspace
```

## Quick Start

### Prerequisites

- Node.js 20+
- Bun 1.1+
- pnpm 9+
- Docker & Docker Compose
- PostgreSQL 16 (or use Docker)
- Redis 7 (or use Docker)

### Setup

```bash
# Clone repository
git clone https://github.com/your-org/audira-ai.git
cd audira-ai

# Install dependencies
pnpm install

# Start databases
docker compose up -d postgres redis

# Setup environment
cp .env.example .env

# Generate Prisma client
pnpm db:generate

# Run migrations
pnpm db:push

# Start all services in development
pnpm dev
```

### Services

| Service | URL | Description |
|---------|-----|-------------|
| Web | http://localhost:3000 | Main frontend |
| Admin | http://localhost:3001 | Admin panel |
| API | http://localhost:4000 | REST + tRPC API |
| AI Engine | http://localhost:4002 | AI services |
| WA Gateway | http://localhost:4003 | WhatsApp gateway |
| Workflows | http://localhost:4004 | Workflow engine |

## Features

- ✅ AI Chatbot (GPT-4o powered)
- ✅ Team Inbox (real-time collaboration)
- ✅ Workflow Automation (visual builder)
- ✅ CRM (contacts, deals, pipelines)
- ✅ Broadcast Campaigns
- ✅ Knowledge Base (RAG)
- ✅ Multi-tenant SaaS
- ✅ RBAC Permissions
- ✅ Real-time Analytics
- ✅ WhatsApp Multi-session

## License

Private - All rights reserved.

</content>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-CHAT-AI\docker-compose.yml" language="dockercompose" >
<content>
version: "3.9"

services:
  # ============ DATABASES ============
  postgres:
    image: pgvector/pgvector:pg16
    container_name: audira-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres
      POSTGRES_DB: audira_db
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: audira-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: redis-server --maxmemory 256mb --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  # ============ APPS (Production) ============
  api:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.api
    container_name: audira-api
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3378:3378"
    environment:
      - PORT=3378
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/audira_db
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379
      - JWT_SECRET=audira-super-secret-jwt-key-2024
      - JWT_REFRESH_SECRET=audira-refresh-secret-key-2024
      - AI_ENGINE_URL=http://ai-engine:3381
      - APP_URL=http://localhost:3377
      - ADMIN_URL=http://localhost:3379
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy

  web:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.web
    container_name: audira-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3377:3377"
    environment:
      - NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3378/api/v1
      - NEXT_PUBLIC_SOCKET_URL=http://localhost:3378
    depends_on:
      - api

  admin:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.web
    container_name: audira-admin
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3379:3379"
    environment:
      - PORT=3379
    depends_on:
      - api

  ai-engine:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.ai-engine
    container_name: audira-ai-engine
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3381:3381"
    environment:
      - AI_ENGINE_PORT=3381
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/audira_db
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379
      - OPENAI_API_KEY=${OPENAI_API_KEY:-sk-placeholder}
      - OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-4o
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy

  whatsapp-gateway:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.whatsapp-gateway
    container_name: audira-whatsapp-gateway
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3382:3382"
    environment:
      - PORT=3382
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/audira_db
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379
      - API_URL=http://api:3378
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy

  # ============ MIGRATION (run once) ============
  migrate:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.api
    container_name: audira-migrate
    command: sh -c "cd packages/database && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && npx prisma generate"
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/audira_db
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: "no"

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  redis_data:

</content>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-CHAT-AI\packages\database\prisma\schema.prisma" language="plaintext" >
<content>
generator client {
  provider        = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider   = "postgresql"
  url        = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

// ============================================
// ENUMS
// ============================================

enum UserRole {
  SUPER_ADMIN
  OWNER
  ADMIN
  AGENT
  VIEWER
  BILLING_MANAGER
}

enum TenantPlan {
  FREE
  STARTER
  PROFESSIONAL
  ENTERPRISE
}

enum ConversationStatus {
  OPEN
  ASSIGNED
  PENDING
  RESOLVED
  CLOSED
}

enum MessageDirection {
  INBOUND
  OUTBOUND
}

enum MessageStatus {
  QUEUED
  SENT
  DELIVERED
  READ
  FAILED
}

enum MessageType {
  TEXT
  IMAGE
  VIDEO
  AUDIO
  DOCUMENT
  LOCATION
  CONTACT
  STICKER
  TEMPLATE
  INTERACTIVE
}

enum WhatsAppProvider {
  CLOUD_API
  BAILEYS
  TWILIO
}

enum SessionStatus {
  CONNECTING
  CONNECTED
  DISCONNECTED
  BANNED
}

enum CampaignStatus {
  DRAFT
  SCHEDULED
  RUNNING
  PAUSED
  COMPLETED
  FAILED
}

enum WorkflowStatus {
  DRAFT
  ACTIVE
  PAUSED
  ARCHIVED
}

enum WorkflowExecutionStatus {
  RUNNING
  COMPLETED
  FAILED
  CANCELLED
}

enum PipelineStage {
  NEW_LEAD
  QUALIFIED
  PROPOSAL
  NEGOTIATION
  WON
  LOST
}

enum AgentType {
  SALES
  MARKETING
  SUPPORT
  REMINDER
  CRM
  CUSTOM
}

enum NotificationType {
  MESSAGE
  ASSIGNMENT
  MENTION
  SYSTEM
  CAMPAIGN
  WORKFLOW
}

// ============================================
// CORE MODELS
// ============================================

model User {
  id                String    @id @default(cuid())
  email             String    @unique
  passwordHash      String?
  name              String
  avatar            String?
  phone             String?
  emailVerified     Boolean   @default(false)
  twoFactorEnabled  Boolean   @default(false)
  twoFactorSecret   String?
  lastLoginAt       DateTime?
  createdAt         DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  memberships         TenantMember[]
  sessions            UserSession[]
  devices             UserDevice[]
  passwordResetTokens PasswordResetToken[]
  assignedChats       Conversation[]   @relation("AssignedAgent")
  messages            Message[]        @relation("SentByUser")
  internalNotes       InternalNote[]
  activities          Activity[]
  notifications       Notification[]
  auditLogs           AuditLog[]
  internalMessages    InternalMessage[] @relation("InternalMessageSender")

  @@map("users")
}

model UserSession {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId       String
  token        String   @unique
  refreshToken String   @unique
  expiresAt    DateTime
  ipAddress    String?
  userAgent    String?
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("user_sessions")
}

model UserDevice {
  id         String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId     String
  deviceName String
  deviceType String
  lastUsedAt DateTime @default(now())
  trusted    Boolean  @default(false)
  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("user_devices")
}

model PasswordResetToken {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  token     String   @unique
  expiresAt DateTime
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("password_reset_tokens")
}

// ============================================
// MULTI-TENANT
// ============================================

model Tenant {
  id          String     @id @default(cuid())
  name        String
  slug        String     @unique
  logo        String?
  domain      String?
  plan        TenantPlan @default(FREE)
  settings    Json       @default("{}")
  metadata    Json       @default("{}")
  createdAt   DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime   @updatedAt

  // Relations
  members          TenantMember[]
  whatsappSessions WhatsAppSession[]
  contacts         Contact[]
  conversations    Conversation[]
  campaigns        Campaign[]
  workflows        Workflow[]
  aiAgents         AIAgent[]
  knowledgeBases   KnowledgeBase[]
  pipelines        Pipeline[]
  apiKeys          ApiKey[]
  webhooks         Webhook[]
  subscription     Subscription?
  invoices         Invoice[]
  auditLogs        AuditLog[]
  analytics        AnalyticsEvent[]
  telegramBots     TelegramBot[]
  discordBots      DiscordBot[]

  @@map("tenants")
}

model TenantMember {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  userId    String
  role      UserRole @default(AGENT)
  joinedAt  DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  user   User   @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([tenantId, userId])
  @@map("tenant_members")
}

// ============================================
// WHATSAPP
// ============================================

model WhatsAppSession {
  id           String          @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId     String
  name         String
  phone        String?
  provider     WhatsAppProvider
  status       SessionStatus   @default(CONNECTING)
  credentials  Json?
  metadata     Json            @default("{}")
  lastActiveAt DateTime?
  createdAt    DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime        @updatedAt

  tenant        Tenant         @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  conversations Conversation[]
  messages      Message[]

  @@map("whatsapp_sessions")
}

// ============================================
// CONTACTS & CRM
// ============================================

model Contact {
  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId        String
  phone           String
  name            String?
  email           String?
  avatar          String?
  tags            String[] @default([])
  status          String   @default("ACTIVE")
  source          String?
  lastContactedAt DateTime?
  metadata        Json     @default("{}")
  lastSeenAt      DateTime?
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant        Tenant         @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  conversations Conversation[]
  deals         Deal[]
  activities    Activity[]
  campaignRecipients CampaignRecipient[]

  @@unique([tenantId, phone])
  @@map("contacts")
}

model Pipeline {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  name      String
  stages    Json     @default("[]")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  deals  Deal[]

  @@map("pipelines")
}

model Deal {
  id         String        @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId   String
  contactId  String
  pipelineId String
  title      String
  value      Float         @default(0)
  stage      PipelineStage @default(NEW_LEAD)
  probability Float        @default(0)
  closedAt   DateTime?
  createdAt  DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt  DateTime      @updatedAt

  contact  Contact  @relation(fields: [contactId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  pipeline Pipeline @relation(fields: [pipelineId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("deals")
}

model Activity {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  contactId String?
  userId    String?
  type      String
  title     String
  content   String?
  metadata  Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  contact Contact? @relation(fields: [contactId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  user    User?    @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@map("activities")
}

// ============================================
// CONVERSATIONS & MESSAGES
// ============================================

model Conversation {
  id              String             @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId        String
  contactId       String
  sessionId       String
  assignedAgentId String?
  channel         String             @default("WHATSAPP")
  status          ConversationStatus @default(OPEN)
  subject         String?
  tags            String[]           @default([])
  priority        String             @default("NORMAL")
  lastMessageAt   DateTime?
  resolvedAt      DateTime?
  firstResponseAt DateTime?
  metadata        Json               @default("{}")
  createdAt       DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime           @updatedAt

  tenant        Tenant          @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  contact       Contact         @relation(fields: [contactId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  session       WhatsAppSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  assignedAgent User?           @relation("AssignedAgent", fields: [assignedAgentId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  messages      Message[]
  internalNotes InternalNote[]

  @@map("conversations")
}

model Message {
  id             String           @id @default(cuid())
  conversationId String
  sessionId      String
  senderId       String?
  direction      MessageDirection
  type           MessageType      @default(TEXT)
  content        String
  mediaUrl       String?
  metadata       Json             @default("{}")
  status         MessageStatus    @default(QUEUED)
  externalId     String?
  isAI           Boolean          @default(false)
  createdAt      DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime         @updatedAt

  conversation Conversation    @relation(fields: [conversationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  session      WhatsAppSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  sender       User?           @relation("SentByUser", fields: [senderId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([conversationId, createdAt])
  @@map("messages")
}

model InternalNote {
  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
  conversationId String
  userId         String
  content        String
  mentions       String[] @default([])
  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())

  conversation Conversation @relation(fields: [conversationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  user         User         @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("internal_notes")
}

// ============================================
// AI SYSTEM
// ============================================

model AIAgent {
  id           String    @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId     String
  name         String
  type         AgentType
  description  String?
  systemPrompt String
  model        String    @default("gpt-4o")
  temperature  Float     @default(0.7)
  tools        Json      @default("[]")
  isActive     Boolean   @default(true)
  metadata     Json      @default("{}")
  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime  @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("ai_agents")
}

model KnowledgeBase {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  name      String
  description String?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant    Tenant              @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  documents KnowledgeDocument[]

  @@map("knowledge_bases")
}

model KnowledgeDocument {
  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
  knowledgeBaseId String
  title           String
  content         String
  sourceUrl       String?
  fileType        String?
  chunkCount      Int      @default(0)
  metadata        Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt

  knowledgeBase KnowledgeBase      @relation(fields: [knowledgeBaseId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  chunks        DocumentChunk[]

  @@map("knowledge_documents")
}

model DocumentChunk {
  id         String    @id @default(cuid())
  documentId String
  content    String
  embedding  String?
  metadata   Json      @default("{}")
  chunkIndex Int
  createdAt  DateTime  @default(now())

  document KnowledgeDocument @relation(fields: [documentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("document_chunks")
}

// ============================================
// WORKFLOWS
// ============================================

model Workflow {
  id          String         @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  name        String
  description String?
  status      WorkflowStatus @default(DRAFT)
  trigger     Json
  nodes       Json           @default("[]")
  edges       Json           @default("[]")
  settings    Json           @default("{}")
  createdAt   DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime       @updatedAt

  tenant     Tenant              @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  executions WorkflowExecution[]

  @@map("workflows")
}

model WorkflowExecution {
  id         String                  @id @default(cuid())
  workflowId String
  status     WorkflowExecutionStatus @default(RUNNING)
  input      Json                    @default("{}")
  output     Json?
  error      String?
  startedAt  DateTime                @default(now())
  finishedAt DateTime?

  workflow Workflow              @relation(fields: [workflowId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  logs     WorkflowExecutionLog[]

  @@map("workflow_executions")
}

model WorkflowExecutionLog {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  executionId String
  nodeId      String
  nodeName    String?
  status      String
  input       Json?
  output      Json?
  error       String?
  duration    Int?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  execution WorkflowExecution @relation(fields: [executionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("workflow_execution_logs")
}

// ============================================
// CAMPAIGNS
// ============================================

model Campaign {
  id          String         @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  name        String
  description String?
  status      CampaignStatus @default(DRAFT)
  template    Json
  scheduledAt DateTime?
  startedAt   DateTime?
  completedAt DateTime?
  stats       Json           @default("{}")
  createdAt   DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime       @updatedAt

  tenant     Tenant              @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  recipients CampaignRecipient[]

  @@map("campaigns")
}

model CampaignRecipient {
  id         String        @id @default(cuid())
  campaignId String
  contactId  String
  status     MessageStatus @default(QUEUED)
  sentAt     DateTime?
  deliveredAt DateTime?
  readAt     DateTime?
  error      String?

  campaign Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  contact  Contact  @relation(fields: [contactId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("campaign_recipients")
}

// ============================================
// BILLING
// ============================================

model Subscription {
  id                String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId          String   @unique
  stripeCustomerId  String?
  stripeSubId       String?
  plan              TenantPlan @default(FREE)
  status            String   @default("active")
  currentPeriodStart DateTime?
  currentPeriodEnd   DateTime?
  cancelAtPeriodEnd  Boolean  @default(false)
  metadata          Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt         DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("subscriptions")
}

model Invoice {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  amount    Float
  currency  String   @default("usd")
  status    String   @default("pending")
  stripeId  String?
  paidAt    DateTime?
  metadata  Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("invoices")
}

// ============================================
// API & WEBHOOKS
// ============================================

model ApiKey {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  name      String
  key       String   @unique
  scopes    String[] @default([])
  lastUsedAt DateTime?
  expiresAt DateTime?
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("api_keys")
}

model Webhook {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  url       String
  events    String[] @default([])
  secret    String
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  metadata  Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("webhooks")
}

// ============================================
// NOTIFICATIONS & AUDIT
// ============================================

model Notification {
  id        String           @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  type      String
  title     String
  body      String?
  data      Json             @default("{}")
  readAt    DateTime?
  createdAt DateTime         @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId, readAt])
  @@map("notifications")
}

model AuditLog {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String?
  userId    String?
  action    String
  entity    String
  entityId  String?
  changes   Json?
  ipAddress String?
  userAgent String?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  tenant Tenant? @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  user   User?   @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([tenantId, createdAt])
  @@map("audit_logs")
}

// ============================================
// ANALYTICS
// ============================================

model AnalyticsEvent {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  event     String
  data      Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([tenantId, event, createdAt])
  @@map("analytics_events")
}

// ============================================
// TELEGRAM
// ============================================

model TelegramBot {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  botId     String
  username  String
  name      String
  token     String
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  webhookUrl String?
  metadata  Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([tenantId, botId])
  @@map("telegram_bots")
}

// ============================================
// DISCORD
// ============================================

model DiscordBot {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  botId     String
  username  String
  name      String
  token     String
  guildId   String?
  channelId String?
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  metadata  Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([tenantId, botId])
  @@map("discord_bots")
}

// ============================================
// CANNED RESPONSES
// ============================================

model CannedResponse {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  shortcut    String
  title       String
  content     String
  category    String   @default("support")
  createdById String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([tenantId, shortcut])
  @@map("canned_responses")
}

// ============================================
// SCHEDULED MESSAGES
// ============================================

model ScheduledMessage {
  id               String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId         String
  conversationId   String
  content          String
  scheduledAt      DateTime
  status           String   @default("pending")
  recurring        Boolean  @default(false)
  recurringPattern String?
  sentAt           DateTime?
  createdById      String?
  createdAt        DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([tenantId, status, scheduledAt])
  @@map("scheduled_messages")
}

// ============================================
// MESSAGE TEMPLATES
// ============================================

model MessageTemplate {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  name        String
  content     String
  variables   String[] @default([])
  category    String   @default("utility")
  channel     String   @default("whatsapp")
  createdById String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([tenantId, name])
  @@map("message_templates")
}

// ============================================
// CONTACT SEGMENTS
// ============================================

model Segment {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  name        String
  description String?
  conditions  Json     @default("[]")
  createdById String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([tenantId, name])
  @@map("segments")
}

// ============================================
// CSAT SURVEYS
// ============================================

model CsatSurvey {
  id             String    @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId       String
  conversationId String
  sentById       String?
  rating         Int?
  comment        String?
  status         String    @default("sent")
  sentAt         DateTime  @default(now())
  respondedAt    DateTime?
  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now())

  @@index([tenantId, status])
  @@map("csat_surveys")
}

// ============================================
// CHATBOT FLOWS
// ============================================

model ChatbotFlow {
  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId        String
  name            String
  status          String   @default("draft")
  triggerKeywords String[] @default([])
  nodes           Json     @default("[]")
  edges           Json     @default("[]")
  createdById     String?
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("chatbot_flows")
}

// ============================================
// TEAM INTERNAL CHAT
// ============================================

model InternalMessage {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  senderId    String
  recipientId String?
  content     String
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  sender User @relation("InternalMessageSender", fields: [senderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([tenantId, createdAt])
  @@map("internal_messages")
}

// ============================================
// SECURITY
// ============================================

model IpWhitelist {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  ip          String
  label       String?
  description String?
  createdById String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  @@unique([tenantId, ip])
  @@map("ip_whitelist")
}

model SsoConfig {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId     String   @unique
  provider     String
  clientId     String
  clientSecret String
  domain       String
  enabled      Boolean  @default(false)
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("sso_configs")
}

</content>

version: "3.9"

services:
  # ============ DATABASES ============
  postgres:
    image: pgvector/pgvector:pg16
    container_name: audira-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres
      POSTGRES_DB: audira_db
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: audira-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: redis-server --maxmemory 256mb --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  # ============ APPS (Production) ============
  api:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.api
    container_name: audira-api
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3378:3378"
    environment:
      - PORT=3378
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/audira_db
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379
      - JWT_SECRET=audira-super-secret-jwt-key-2024
      - JWT_REFRESH_SECRET=audira-refresh-secret-key-2024
      - AI_ENGINE_URL=http://ai-engine:3381
      - APP_URL=http://localhost:3377
      - ADMIN_URL=http://localhost:3379
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy

  web:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.web
    container_name: audira-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3377:3377"
    environment:
      - NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3378/api/v1
      - NEXT_PUBLIC_SOCKET_URL=http://localhost:3378
    depends_on:
      - api

  admin:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.web
    container_name: audira-admin
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3379:3379"
    environment:
      - PORT=3379
    depends_on:
      - api

  ai-engine:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.ai-engine
    container_name: audira-ai-engine
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3381:3381"
    environment:
      - AI_ENGINE_PORT=3381
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/audira_db
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379
      - OPENAI_API_KEY=${OPENAI_API_KEY:-sk-placeholder}
      - OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-4o
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy

  whatsapp-gateway:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.whatsapp-gateway
    container_name: audira-whatsapp-gateway
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3382:3382"
    environment:
      - PORT=3382
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/audira_db
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379
      - API_URL=http://api:3378
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy

  # ============ MIGRATION (run once) ============
  migrate:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.api
    container_name: audira-migrate
    command: sh -c "cd packages/database && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && npx prisma generate"
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/audira_db
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: "no"

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  redis_data:

</content>
</file>

# 🚀 QUICK START GUIDE - AUDIRA-CHAT-AI

**Last Updated**: 2026-05-17 08:02:00 UTC  
**Status**: ✅ Ready for Development

---

## ⚡ TL;DR - Get Started in 5 Minutes

```bash
# 1. Install dependencies
pnpm install

# 2. Setup environment
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env with your credentials

# 3. Start databases
docker compose -f config/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis

# 4. Setup database
pnpm db:generate
pnpm db:push

# 5. Start development
pnpm dev
```

**Done!** All services will be running at:
- 🌐 Web: http://localhost:3377
- 👨‍💼 Admin: http://localhost:3379
- 🔌 API: http://localhost:3378

---

## 📋 Prerequisites

### Required
- ✅ Node.js 20+ ([Download](https://nodejs.org/))
- ✅ pnpm 9+ (`npm install -g pnpm`)
- ✅ Docker Desktop ([Download](https://www.docker.com/products/docker-desktop))

### Optional
- Bun 1.1+ (for API runtime)
- Rust (for desktop app)
- PostgreSQL 16 (if not using Docker)
- Redis 7 (if not using Docker)

---

## 🎯 Step-by-Step Setup

### Step 1: Clone & Install (2 minutes)

```bash
# Clone repository (if not already done)
git clone <your-repo-url>
cd AUDIRA-CHAT-AI

# Install all dependencies
pnpm install
```

**What this does:**
- Installs all workspace dependencies
- Links internal packages
- Sets up git hooks (husky)

---

### Step 2: Environment Configuration (2 minutes)

```bash
# Copy environment template
cp .env.example .env

# Edit with your favorite editor
code .env  # or nano .env
```

**Required Variables:**
```env
# Database
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/audira_db

# Redis
REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379

# JWT Secrets (change these!)
JWT_SECRET=your-super-secret-jwt-key-change-in-production
JWT_REFRESH_SECRET=your-refresh-secret-key

# OpenAI (get from https://platform.openai.com/api-keys)
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-your-openai-api-key
```

**Optional Variables:**
```env
# OAuth - Google
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=your-google-client-id
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=your-google-client-secret

# WhatsApp Cloud API
WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN=your-whatsapp-token
WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID=your-phone-number-id

# Stripe (for billing)
STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_your-stripe-key
```

---

### Step 3: Start Databases (1 minute)

```bash
# Start PostgreSQL + Redis with Docker
docker compose -f config/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis

# Verify they're running
docker ps
```

**Expected Output:**
```
CONTAINER ID   IMAGE                    STATUS
abc123def456   pgvector/pgvector:pg16   Up 10 seconds
def789ghi012   redis:7-alpine           Up 10 seconds
```

**Troubleshooting:**
- Port 5432 already in use? Stop local PostgreSQL: `sudo service postgresql stop`
- Port 6379 already in use? Stop local Redis: `sudo service redis stop`

---

### Step 4: Setup Database (1 minute)

```bash
# Generate Prisma Client
pnpm db:generate

# Push schema to database
pnpm db:push

# (Optional) Open Prisma Studio to view database
pnpm --filter @audira/database db:studio
```

**What this does:**
- Generates TypeScript types from Prisma schema
- Creates 42 tables in PostgreSQL
- Sets up pgvector extension for AI embeddings

---

### Step 5: Start Development (30 seconds)

```bash
# Start all services in development mode
pnpm dev
```

**This starts:**
- 🌐 Web App (Next.js) - Port 3377
- 👨‍💼 Admin Panel (Next.js) - Port 3379
- 🔌 API Server (Bun + Hono) - Port 3378
- 🤖 AI Engine (LangGraph) - Port 3381
- 📱 WhatsApp Gateway (Baileys) - Port 3382
- ⚙️ Workflow Engine (BullMQ) - Port 3383

```bash
pnpm format                 # Format code with Prettier
```

### Docker
```bash
# Start databases only
docker compose -f config/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis

# Start all services (production mode)
docker compose -f config/docker-compose.yml up -d

# Stop all services
docker compose -f config/docker-compose.yml down

# View logs
docker compose -f config/docker-compose.yml logs -f
```

---

## 🐛 Troubleshooting

### Issue: Port Already in Use

**Problem:**
```
Error: listen EADDRINUSE: address already in use :::3377
```

**Solution:**
```bash
# Find process using the port
netstat -ano | findstr :3377  # Windows
lsof -i :3377                 # Mac/Linux

# Kill the process
taskkill /PID <PID> /F        # Windows
kill -9 <PID>                 # Mac/Linux
```

---

### Issue: Database Connection Failed

**Problem:**
```
Error: Can't reach database server at localhost:5432
```

**Solution:**
```bash
# Check if PostgreSQL is running
docker ps | grep postgres

# If not running, start it
docker compose -f config/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres

# Check logs
docker logs audira-postgres
```

---

### Issue: Prisma Client Not Generated

**Problem:**
```
Error: @prisma/client did not initialize yet
```

**Solution:**
```bash
# Generate Prisma client
pnpm db:generate

# If still fails, clean and regenerate
rm -rf node_modules/.prisma
pnpm db:generate
```

---

### Issue: Module Not Found

**Problem:**
```
Error: Cannot find module '@audira/database'
```

**Solution:**
```bash
# Reinstall dependencies
rm -rf node_modules
pnpm install

# Rebuild workspace
pnpm build
```

---

### Issue: TypeScript Errors

**Problem:**
```
Error: Type 'X' is not assignable to type 'Y'
```

**Solution:**
```bash
# Check TypeScript version
pnpm list typescript

# Restart TypeScript server (VS Code)
Ctrl+Shift+P → "TypeScript: Restart TS Server"

# Clean and rebuild
pnpm clean
pnpm build
```
